name: A Formalization of the Mean-Field Derivation of the Vlasov Equation

description: arXiv:2607.08986v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We formalize a research result in the Lean 4 proof assistant by having a mathematician direct an AI system, and frame the activity as a formalization game. The objective is to turn a LaTeX document into Lean. The game is won when the development compiles, contains no sorry, and a machine check shows the target theorems rest on Lean's foundatio...
author: Joseph K. Miller
